entry_id.description: Primary key for the public API entry. Currently identical to public_api.

public_api.description: Fully qualified public API name, such as mindspore.Tensor.abs.

public_surface.description: Public namespace that owns the API entry, such as mindspore.ops or mindspore.Tensor.

public_name.description: Short public name of the API entry, without namespace.

entry_type.description: Routing topology type of the public API entry.

source_type.description: How this entry was first discovered in MindSpore source scanning.

source_path.description: Source file path where the entry was first anchored during discovery.
